headline: Apple's Expanding Enterprise Footprint to Boost Sales: What's Ahead?
summary: AAPL's enterprise push accelerates as major clients deploy thousands of devices, lifting its installed base and setting up double-digit sales growth.

headline: Extend Brings Better Expense Solutions to A Bank Near You
summary: NEW YORK, March 26, 2026--Extend, an AI-powered spend and expense management platform, today announced new support for Sage Intacct, Xero, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, further expanding its expense management offering for banks and their business customers.

headline: 3 Stocks Estimated To Be Up To 38.3% Below Intrinsic Value
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it is up 16% over the past year with earnings expected to grow by 16% annually in the coming years. In this context, identifying undervalued stocks—those trading below their intrinsic value—can present potential opportunities for investors looking to capitalize on future growth.
